description: Ontology explorer and visualizer. The meta-tool for defining, browsing, and publishing atom types, predicates, and valid type combinations.

atomTypes.label: EntityType
atomTypes.description: Schema type definition (e.g., Person, Organization, Skill)

predicates.label: is a
predicates.description: Entity type inherits from another type

predicates.label: has predicate
predicates.description: Entity type supports a specific predicate

predicates.label: valid for
predicates.description: Predicate is valid for a specific entity type (domain/range)
